start.text: It's April 2024. You're curled up on your bed in Burquitlam, your calico cat judging you from the pillow. You're scrolling through Salams. Most profiles blur together... but then one makes you stop. You're Enchanted to meet him, you might say.

start_loop.text: You scroll past... but something pulls you back. Your thumb hovers. The cat meows impatiently. You know you have to swipe right.

cat_lady.text:
You swipe left on everyone. You adopt 7 cats. You name them Monday through Sunday. Life is peaceful. The cats don't argue. The cats don't leave dishes in the sink.

You Meow at them often. Only Monday Meows back. Saturday, a squishy fat fuck, just judges you for late night ice cream.

...but the cats can't send you memes at 2am. Wednesday just stares at you. This isn't it.

first_chat.text: You match with Ali! The first messages turn into long conversations. Then the phone calls start — hours that feel like minutes, nights that disappear into laughter and stories. Your cat falls asleep to the sound of his voice.

memes.text: Instagram becomes your second language. Reels at 2am. Memes that only make sense to the two of you. Every notification from him makes your heart skip. You send him cat videos. He sends worse ones back. This is how it's supposed to feel — like a new Beginning.

choices.label: He invites you to meet up 🚶🏼🌊

memes_loop.text:
He replies instantly. Then another meme. Then another. The cat is getting jealous of your screen time. But the phone screen isn't enough anymore...

...or IS it? One more meme couldn't hurt.

memes_loop_2.text:
You send him a cursed image of a cat in a business suit. He replies with something a little riskyy. You screenshot it. Send it to Mrinal.

This man WANTS you.

memes_loop_3.text:
It's 4am. You've been sending memes for 6 hours straight. The cat has given up on you. Your phone is at 3%. You've entered the meme shadow realm.

But even the shadow realm can't replace seeing his face in person.
 At least IRL he can't ask 'what colour is your...'
It's time.

choices.label: Okay FINE. Meet in person. Only for a quick coffee though ☕

meme_to_mom.text:
You freeze. You look at your screen. You sent that meme — THAT meme — to the family group chat.

Mom has seen it. Dad has seen it. Your khala has seen it. Your cousin who screenshots everything has DEFINITELY seen it.

Mom is typing...
Mom is typing...
Mom is typing...

"Who is this boy."

choices.label: Try to explain what a meme is 😰

meme_to_mom_2.text:
Emergency family meeting. You're sat down in the living room. The family WhatsApp has been BUZZING.

Mom: "Is he Muslim?"
Dad: "What does he do?"
Khala: "Show me his profile."
Cousin: *already stalking his Instagram*

Mom is either planning the wedding or the funeral. You can't tell which.

The cat watches from the doorway. Even he looks disappointed.

Somehow, you survive. But now Ali has to impress the entire family. No pressure.

choices.label: Mom takes over. It's arranged now. 💍

first_meet.text: May 2024. Granville Station. Your heart is pounding as the train pulls in. You step onto the platform, look around... and there he is. The voice from all those late-night calls, standing right in front of you. Long story short — you survived.

pacific_centre.text:
You panic. You DUCK. You speed-walk into Pacific Centre like your life depends on it. You're weaving through Sephora, hiding behind a mannequin. Your heart is racing.

Your phone buzzes: "Hey I think I see you... are you hiding behind a headless mannequin in Zara?"

...He saw you.

pacific_centre_2.text:
You sprint past H&M. Past the food court. You duck into the Lego store and crouch behind the Millennium Falcon display.

A 7-year-old stares at you. "Are you okay, lady?"

Your phone buzzes again: "I'm in the Lego store. I can see your hijab behind the Millennium Falcon btw."

This man knows his Lego. He might be the one to Lego my Eggo

pacific_centre_3.text:
You stand up. The 7-year-old claps. Ali is grinning. You're bright red.

"Nice hiding spot. You're as red as 🇧🇩 in your green sweater" he says.
"Better than 🇵🇰 being a one-star review" you reply.

He laughs. You laugh. The 7-year-old goes back to his Lego- making Han and Leia kiss. And somehow, this is the most unhinged and perfect first meeting you could have asked for.

Accidentally caught feelings… oops

You head out of Pacific Centre together. His hand holding yours

coal_harbour.text:
You walk together to Coal Harbour. The city lights shimmer on the water like a Love Story playing out in real time. The conversation flows just like it did on the phone — but now you can see his smile.

 A stray cat watches you two from a bench. Even it approves.

choices.label: Never let go of this feeling

tattoo_idea.text:
First date adrenaline hits different. You're walking along the seawall, the city glowing, and your mouth moves faster than your brain:

"We should get matching tattoos."

He stops. Looks at you. Looks at the tattoo shop across the street. Looks back at you.

"...I'm not saying no."

You're inside the shop 4 minutes later.

tattoo_result.text:
You get a tiny cat paw on your wrist. Tasteful. Cute. No regrets.

Ali gets 'biryani' in Arabic calligraphy on his forearm. The tattoo artist stares at you both for a full 10 seconds.

"...You two met TODAY?"
"Yeah."
"...Respect."

Dorito will never know you permanently inked a cat paw on your body for him. But Ali knows. And somehow this is the most unhinged first date either of you have ever been on.

You walk out feeling invincible.

choices.label: Make it official (you kinda have to now)

official.text: June 2024. No more wondering, no more 'what are we.' It's official. He's yours and you're his. The late-night calls become goodnight kisses. The memes become inside jokes whispered in person. This is your Lover era.

choices.label: Test him: send 'we need to talk' 😈

we_need_to_talk.text:
You send it. The four most terrifying words in any relationship:

"We need to talk."

Read at 3:47pm. No reply. You watch the typing indicator appear. Disappear. Appear. Disappear.

27 minutes later, he's at your door. Flowers. Chocolate. AND a printed confirmation of a vet appointment for Dorito he'd been putting off for 3 weeks.

"I don't know what I did but I'm sorry and also Dorito is getting his shots on Thursday."

You stare at him. "...I was going to ask what you want for dinner."

He passes the test. He passed it so hard he lapped it. The cat is getting vaccinated. The man is LOCKED IN.

choices.label: He's a keeper. Go on ALL the dates.

dates_montage.text:
The summer is a highlight reel. Fireworks at English Bay — his arm around you as colours explode overhead. Van Dusen Gardens — getting lost in the hedge maze, him pretending he knows the way (he doesn't). Hiking Quarry Rock — you out-pacing him and pretending you're not tired at the top.

Ice cream runs. Sunset drives. Cat café visits where Dorito would be jealous if he knew. Thankfully he's neutered

cooking_disaster.text:
You decide to make biryani from scratch. Together. How hard can it be?

Step 1: Ali insists his mom's recipe is better. You insist YOUR mom's is better. A 20-minute argument over cumin quantity.

Step 2: Something is burning. What is burning? Everything. Everything is burning.

Step 3: Dorito jumps on the counter and knocks a whole container of turmeric onto the floor. The kitchen looks like a crime scene. A yellow crime scene.

cooking_disaster_2.text:
The smoke alarm goes off. Dorito BOLTS under the bed. Ali is fanning the alarm with a dish towel. You're laughing so hard you can't breathe.

The fire department shows up. A fireman looks at the pot. Looks at you. Looks at Ali covered in turmeric.

"Is this... biryani?"
"It was supposed to be."

He nods solemnly. "Order Uber Eats."

You order Uber Eats. You just paid a broke Arab guy to bring you food- God knows why he bought a white BMW. You eat on the floor because the kitchen table is a war zone- Kashmir. The biryani from the restaurant is mid. The Pink Chai is cold. But sitting on the floor with him, covered in turmeric, with Dorito finally emerging from hiding — it's perfect.

This is who you are as a couple.

choices.label:
Accept your fate as non-cooks.
At least you won't be an Arab guy's stay-at-home Habibi

fight_night.text:
Then one night... Ali says something stupid. Really stupid. The kind of stupid that makes you stare at him for 69 full seconds in silence.

You fight. All night. The cat hides under the bed.

It's 1:47am. You're both exhausted.

makeup_2am.text:
At 2am, "I'm sorry. That was dumb. I was being dumb."

You're quiet for a second. Then: "Yeah, you were."

He laughs softly. You laugh too. The cat comes out from under the bed.

You talk until you both fall asleep — just like the early days. You get a full night's sleep. Tomorrow is a new day.

makeout_5am.text:
5am. You've been going back and forth for HOURS. Eyes red. Hair a mess.

"I'm sorry."
"You're an idiot."
"I know."

...The cat leaves the room. You make up. Aggressively 💦. The sun comes up. Neither of you slept. Both of you are smiling.

This is a core memory 💅🏼

engaged.text: June 2025. One year later — your anniversary. He gets down on one knee. Every phone call, every meme, every walk along the water led to this moment. It's a Love Story, baby, just say...

choices.label:
Actually... choose an Arab guy instead 🤔
Koobideh is mid AF. Shawarma is 🥵

arab_guy.text:
You choose an Arab guy instead. He is charming. He is mysterious. He says 'habibi' a lot.

Day 1: "Why were you 3 minutes late?"
Day 2: "Who liked your photo?"
Day 3: "I just think it's funny how..."

You are being gaslit. The cat tried to warn you.

arab_guy_2nd_wife.text:
You bear with it. This is your life now.

He gets a second wife.

She also gets gaslit.

You two bond over it. You start a support group. The group chat is called 'Habibi's Haunted House.'

The cat is the only one thriving.

choices.label: ↩️ Habibi gets no Zawaj. Leave him and find a normal guy. Koobideh ain't that bad.

arab_guy_cats.text:
You leave him. You adopt a calico cat and an orange one. The calico is wise. The orange one has exactly one brain cell but unlimited love.

They never gaslight you. They never get a second wife. They just knock things off the counter at 3am.

Honestly? Upgrade.

But they still get more action than you do.

choices.label: ↩️ Go back to Salams and find a normal guy

married.text:
December 7th, 2025. Eighteen months after a swipe on a dating app, you marry your best friend. The person who matched your meme energy, stayed up on the phone for hours, and walked with you through Coal Harbour on that very first night.

You found something Beautiful — and it's yours to keep. Billy and Dorito wore tiny bowties.

wedding_objection.text:
The imam asks: "Does anyone object to this marriage?"

You stand up. At your own wedding. In your own dress.

Everyone gasps. Your mom almost faints. Ali's eyes go wide. The photographer gets the shot of a lifetime.

"I object..."

*dramatic pause*

"...to the biryani not being spicy enough."

Ali slams his hand on the table: "I TOLD the caterer! I said extra mirch!"

The imam looks at God for strength. Your mom sits back down. The caterer is sweating.

Crisis resolved. Extra green chutney is deployed. The nikah continues.

Billy and Dorito, in their tiny bowties, are unbothered.

wedding_blonde.text:
You freeze mid-objection. Because there, in the THIRD ROW, sitting between your khala and a confused uncle — is HER.

The blonde. From the dream. THE DREAM YOU NEVER HAD because you chose Ali and NOT the Arab guy and this timeline doesn't even MAKE SENSE.

She's wearing Lululemon. To a nikah. She has a Birkin. It says 'They underestimated me. Mistake.' She's petting... Billy.

Ali leans over: "Babe, do you know that blonde lady?"

"NO." (You're sweating.)

Billy slow-blinks at you from her lap. The cat kiss. THE CAT KISS. Across timelines. Across realities. This cat is HAUNTING you.

The imam clears his throat. "Can we... continue?"

The blonde waves. Billy waves. Cats can't wave.

You grab Ali's hand. "FINISH THE NIKAH. NOW. Before the multiverse collapses."

The nikah is completed in record time. The blonde disappears. Billy is back with Dorito. Your khala says she "didn't see anyone." Your uncle asks if you're feeling okay.

You are NOT okay. But you are MARRIED. And that's what matters.

Dorito, in his bowtie, saw the whole thing. He will never tell.

invite_him_over.text:
Ali comes over. Dorito inspects him at the door — sniffs once, twice — and then headbutts his leg. Approved.

You two spend the evening on the couch. Dorito wedges himself between you both, purring like a motorboat. Ali scratches behind his ears. You watch Mastizaade. It's perfect. You are satisfied.

...Fast forward. You're 74. You have short-term remembery loss. You can't remember where you put your Mia Khalifa glasses. But you remember THIS night. The night Ali played with Dorito. The highlight of your youth.

Just keep swimming, Anika. Just keep swimming. 🐟

married_2.text:
Mom has decided. It's arranged. No more Salams. No more swiping. Mom found a "nice boy" — and by nice she means his family knows someone who knows someone.

Ali, a Shia Ismaili boy, converts to Sunni to win your family's approval. He grows a beard overnight. Literally overnight. You're not sure how.

The wedding is beautiful. Except for the বাংলাদেশ জামায়াতে ইসলামী flag your uncle hung up as "decoration". Your uncle insists it's "just calligraphy" from his days captaining the BNS Bokachoda 🐟

 The photographer is sweating

Ali whispers to you: "I don't even know what madhab I am anymore."

Dorito and White Sharia watch from the corner, wearing tiny topis. They're the only ones unbothered.

arab_guy_habibi.text:
You know what? You're unbothered. You're moisturized. You're thriving.

You LEAN INTO the gaslighting. You gaslight him BACK.

"Habibi, I never said that."
"Habibi, you're imagining things."
"Habibi, my phone died for 6 hours."

He's SHOOK. Shik Shak SHOOK. Nobody has ever out-habibied him. He doesn't know what to do. Somewhere in the distance, Shik Shak Shok starts playing and you hit every beat while he ugly-cries into his keffiyeh. He starts journaling. He gets therapy. He cries in his G-Wagon.

You now run the household. The shawarma is always fresh. The cats have a gold-plated litter box. You vacation in Dubai every other month.

You are the first wife, the last wife, and the ONLY wife. He wouldn't dare.

Dorito wears a tiny keffiyeh. He's thriving too.

Alhamdulillah. You won.

arab_guy_dream.text:
You fall asleep on your gold-threaded chaise lounge, victorious. The G-Wagon hums outside. Dorito purrs on your chest in his tiny keffiyeh.

But then... in your dream.

The guy your rejected. He's sitting on that same bench from your first date, looking like a whole snack.

And there's Billy. His muscular white cat. Sitting on his lap. Being pet by... a BLONDE. A HOT blonde. She's wearing Lululemon. She has a Birkin- you had to werk for yours. She's laughing at something Ali said. Billy is PURRING. Billy has never purred like that for YOU.

The blonde boops Billy's nose. Billy slow-blinks at her. That's a CAT KISS. That's a cat kiss meant for YOU.

Ali looks up at dream-you floating in the sky. He waves. The blonde waves. Billy waves. Cats can't wave. This is a nightmare.

You wake up SCREAMING. Your Arab husband rolls over: "Habibi what's wrong?"

"NOTHING. Go back to sleep."

You stare at the ceiling. Shawarma is good. Shawarma is GREAT. You don't even LIKE koobideh. You don't miss Ali. You don't miss Billy.

...

You ask ChatGPT "how to stop dreaming about your ex's cat" at 4am.

No results. You are alone in this.

finale.text:
Happy Birthday, Anika 🎂

From a Salams swipe to forever — every chapter with you is my favourite. You are the best thing that's ever been mine.

Here's to many more birthdays together, more late-night laughs, more memes, more cat cuddles, and more adventures in this beautiful life we're building.

I love you. Always. 💕🐱

post_credits.text:
🎬 POST-CREDITS SCENE

...Meanwhile, in a parallel universe.

Cat Lady Anika sits on her throne. Seven cats surround her. Monday through Sunday. She's watching Netflix alone. The third bowl of ice cream sits in her lap. Saturday judges. Wednesday knocks a glass off the table. It shatters. Nobody cares.

Her phone buzzes.

A notification from Salams. A new match.

She looks at the profile. It's... an Arab guy. He says 'habibi' in his bio. His first photo is in a G-Wagon. His second photo is a mirror selfie at the gym.

She swipes left.

Monday meows.

"Yeah," she whispers. "I know."

She opens Uber Eats. Orders biryani. For one.

The cats purr. The ice cream melts. The Netflix asks if she's still watching.

She is.

She always is.

...

🎬 FIN
